hooks.command: case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) py "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/src/utils/agent_skills/subconscious/subconscious_recall.py" ;; *) python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/src/utils/agent_skills/subconscious/subconscious_recall.py" ;; esac

case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) py "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/src/utils/agent_skills/conversation/conversation_ingest.py" --quiet --log ;; *) python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/src/utils/agent_skills/conversation/conversation_ingest.py" --quiet --log ;; esac
